description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed candelabra sconce made of a metallic material with a bronze or antique brass finish. The central stem is elegantly shaped with a series of curves and tapers, supporting three candle holders arranged symmetrically. Each arm extends outward in a gentle arc, ending in a round candle cup, each holding a white, cylindrical candle. The base is wide and flared, providing stability and a classic touch. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or classical European lighting fixtures, often seen in historic urban settings or upscale outdoor environments.
description: A vintage-style, bronze-finished three-armed candelabra sconce with white candles and ornate curves. The design is elegant and classical, suitable for historic or decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three candle arms and the ornate central stem, with all candles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the sconce's depth, with only the central candle and the profile of the arms visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetry of the arms and the back of the candle holders.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the sconce's depth and the alignment of the arms from the side.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and classical with ornate curves and a bronze finish, evoking European antique candelabra styles.
